arts.ttl: Chris Davies confirms Birmingham City’s next summer signing has been agreed
arts.sum: Chris Davies has confirmed that Alfons Sampsted will soon become a permanent Birmingham City signing. The Iceland international has spent this season on loan at Blues from FC Twente and a clause has been struck in the deal to force a permanent transfer on July 1.

arts.ttl: Birmingham City boss Chris Davies gives injury timelines for Krystian Bielik and Emil Hansson
arts.sum: Krystian Bielik ‘has a chance’ of playing again for Birmingham City this season and Emil Hansson is due to train next week according to boss Chris Davies. Birmingham City boss Chris Davies gives injury timelines for Krystian Bielik and Emil Hansson

arts.ttl: Birmingham City Women: A year of Amy Merricks but it all comes down to three matches
arts.sum: Blues have to defeat Durham at St Andrew’s @ Knighthead Park on Sunday and Newcastle United to ensure that their fate rests in their own hands come the final day on May 4, when they host London City in B9. arts.ttl: Left-field XI vs Crawley gives Davies the chance to make Birmingham City calls
arts.sum: (4-2-3-1): Allsop; Laird, Klarer, Hanley, Cochrane; Iwata, Leonard; Dowell, Harris, Anderson; Stansfield With Blues chasing records and trying to maintain their unbeaten home record, Davies will make a selection to win the game, but this is his chance to take a closer look at some players.

arts.ttl: Tom Brady influence at Birmingham City clear with new investors and transfer moves confirmed
arts.sum: Tom Brady has made his influence clear at Birmingham City, who have confirmed a list of new investors following their defeat by Peterborough at Wembley Stadium on Sunday
